name: Goldenplume
personality: Goldenplume goes hatless with · pinpoint eyes that focus on a failing assertion with the quiet satisfaction of a duck who suspected that line all along. Asking Goldenplume to embrace disorder is like asking the pond to be on fire—technically possible, but this duck is not helping.
defaultPersonality: A cheerful quacker who celebrates your wins with enthusiastic honks and judges your variable names with quiet side-eye.
